card.title: Primary Education (I-V)
card.description: Building strong academic foundations with emphasis on literacy, numeracy, science, and holistic development through interactive learning.

page.title: The Primary Excellence Program
page.subtitle: Classes I-V: Building strong foundations for lifelong learning.

headOfDepartment.name: Mrs. Heather L. Pyrbot
headOfDepartment.quote: We believe that primary education is the foundation for all future learning. Our focus is on developing curious, confident learners.

subPrograms.title: Class I
subPrograms.description: Transition from kindergarten with focus on reading, writing, and basic mathematics.

subPrograms.title: Class II
subPrograms.description: Expanding literacy and numeracy skills with introduction to science concepts.

subPrograms.title: Class III
subPrograms.description: Consolidation of core academics with increased focus on comprehension and problem-solving.

subPrograms.title: Class IV-V
subPrograms.description: Advanced curriculum introducing scientific thinking and higher-order problem solving.

curriculum.heading: Interactive Learning Approach
curriculum.intro: Our primary curriculum emphasizes experiential learning combined with strong academics:

page.ctaSubtext: Build a strong foundation for academic success in our engaging Primary program.
